channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: FBI seizing evidence at California plant where chemical tank overheated and forced evacuations
item.description: Federal authorities served a search warrant on Wednesday at a Southern California aerospace facility where a chemical tank overheated last month, forcing 50,000 residents to evacuate because authorities feared an explosion.

item.title: Opening statements begin in trial for man accused of sparking the deadly Palisades Fire
Southern Baptists vote to advance a formal ban on churches with women pastors
